MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 5th February 1968 S.O. 481 —In exercise of the powers conferred hy section 21 of the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act. l!)G7 (37 of 19H7). the Central Government hereby makes the /allowing rules, namely: • 1. Short title and commencement.—n) These rules wav- be called the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Rules. 1J1B8- (2) They shall come into lorce on the date ol their publication in the Officio! Gazette- 2- Definitions— In there rules, unless the context otherwise requires,— (a) "the Act" mean.': the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act, Utfi? (37 of l!)fi7); (b) ''section" means a section .of the Act; {<•) words and repressions used in these rules but not defined- and defined In the Act shall have the meanings respectively assigned to them In the Act. zne 3 Tribunal and District Juctffc to follow rules of evidence. — (1) In holding an •julry under suh-secticm (3) of section 4 or disposing of any aoplication und e r sub-section (4) of section 7 or sub-section (flj of section 8. the Tribunal or the District Judge, as the case may be. shall, subject to the provisions of sub-rule (2), follow, as far as practicable, thp rules of evidence Inid clown in the Indian Evidenc* Act. 1872 CI of 1872). ( 8 7 ) -- 1 of 3 -- R8 T H E GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY [PAWT I I - (2) N o t w i t h s t a n d i n g a n y t h i n g contained i n t h e I n d i a n E v i d e n c e Act. 1872, w h e r e any b o o k s of a c c o u n t or o t h e r d o c u m e n t s a r e claimed b y t h e C e n t r a l Gov- e r n m e n t to b e of a confidential n a t u r e , t h e T r i b u n a l o r t h e C o u r t of t h e D i s t r i c t J u d r e shall n o t , — ( a ) c o m p e l t h a t G o v e r n m e n t t o p r o d u c e b e f o r e it s u c h b o o k s of a c c o u n t or o t h e r d o c u m e n t s , or ( b ) w h e r e a n y s u c h b o o k s of account or o t h e r d o c u m e n t s h a v e b e e n p r o - d u c e d before It b y t h a t G o v e r n m e n t , — (1) m a k e s u c h books of account or o t h e r d o c u m e n t s a p a r t of t h e r e c o r d s of t h e proceedings before it, or (it) alve inspection of, or c o p y of t h e whole of. o r a n y e x t r a c t from, a n y s u c h h o o k s of account or other d o c u m e n t s to a n y p a r t y before i t or t o a n y other person. 4. Additional mode* of service of notification made under section 3.—Without p r e j u d i c e to t h e g e n e r a l i t y of t h e p r o v i s i o n s of sub-section (4) of section 3, all or a n y of t h e following modos m a y also b e followed in effecting s e r v i c e of a notifi- cation m a d e u n d e r sub-section (1) of section 3, n a m e l y : — (a) b y m a k i n g an a n n o u n c e m e n t over t h e r a d i o from t h e Jocal or n e a r e s t b r o a d c a s t i n g station of t h e AJl-Indla E a d i o . or ( b ) b y p a s t i n g t h e notification on t h e n o t i c e b o a r d of t h e office of t h e D i s t r i c t M a g i s t r a t e or t h e T e h s i l d a r at the h e a d q u a r t e r s of t h e d i s t r i c t or the tehfill, as t h e cose m a y be, in which t h e p r i n c i p a l office of t h e association affected is s i t u a t e d . 5- D o c u m e n t s w h i c h should accompany a. reference to t h e T r i b u n a l — E v e r y reference m a d e to t h e T r i b u n a l u n d e r sub-section (1) of section 4 shall h e accom- p a n i e d b y — (I) a copy of t h e notification m o d e u n d e r sub-section (1) of section ;*, Find (li) all t h e facts on w h i c h t h e g r o u n d s specified in t h e s a i d notification a r e b a s e d : P r o v i d e d t h a t n o t h i n g In t h i s r u l e shall r e q u i r e t h e C e n t r a l G o v e r n m e n t to disclose a n y fact t o t h e T r i b u n a l w h i c h t h a t G o v e r n m e n t c o n s i d e r s a g a i n s t t h e public i n t e r p s t t o disclose. 6. Set-rice of notice Issued by the Tribunal — E v e r y notice r e f e r r e d t o in s u b - section (2) of Section 4 Khali b e served on t h e affected association in s u c h m a n n e r • s t h e T r i b u n a l m a y t h i n k fit and all or a n y of t h e following m o d e s m a y b e follow- ed b y t h e T r i b u n a l in effecting service of such notice, n a m e l y : — ( a ) b y affixing a copy of t h e n o t i c e to some conspicuous p a r t o£ i h e office, if any, of t h e association; or ( b ) b y s e r v i n g a copy of t h e notice, w h e r e possible, on t h e p r i n c i p a l office b e a r e r s , if any, of t h e association, b y r e g i s t e r e d post or o t h e r w i s e ; or (c) b y p r o c l a i m i n g b y b e a t of d r u m or b y m e a n s of l o u d s p e a k e r s t h e con- t e n t s of t h e notification In t h e a r e a In which the activities of t h e association a r e o r d i n a r i l y carried on. 7. Tribunal to h a v e a s e a l — ( 1 ) T h e T r i b u n a l shall h a v e a seal of such d i m e n - sions a n d in s u c h form a s It m a y t h i n k fit (?.) E v e r y o r d e r m a d e or notice issued b y t h e T r i b u n a l shall b e a u t h e n t i c a t e d b y affixing its seal t h e r e o n . 8. Tribunal to h a v e tt Registrar.—(1) T h e T r i b u n a l shall h a v e a R e g i s t r a r w h o s h a l l b e e i t h e r a w h o l e - t i m e or p a r t - t i m e officer of t h e G o v e r n m e n t . (2) T h e R e g i s t r a r s h a l l h a v e t h e custody of t h e seal a n d t h e r e c o r d s of t h e T r i b u n a l a n d s h a l l e x e r c i s e such oiher i u m c t i o n s as m a y b e assigned to h i m by t h e T r i b u n a l . -- 2 of 3 -- *KC. $(i»}| THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY 89 9. Referevr.e to the Tribunal to be addressed to the Refilstrar—Everv reference made to the Tribunal under section 4 shall be addressed and sent to the. Registrar who shall, immediately after the receiDt of such reference or as soon as possible thereafter- place the same before the Chairman for his orders [No- F. 2 2 / 1 / 6 8 - P O 1 U ( A J . ] On behalf and in the name of the President of India.
